keyFindings.label: 7 natural design domain clusters identified in external corpus
Umbrella model strongly preferred over hub for 5-7 design sub-domains
6 sub-skills proposed: visual, color, motion, layout, a11y, interaction
sk-design-interface rename to sk-design-visual: MEDIUM risk, 2-3 day effort
~55 of 97 designer-skills-main skills absorbed into 6 sub-skills
Parent uses priority-ordered keyword detection, defaults to sk-design-visual
Full design tasks route to sk-design-visual as gateway, which dispatches to siblings
Research converged: 7/7 questions answered, newInfoRatio trend 0.95->0.35

openQuestions: Sub-skill count confirmation (6 recommended, 5 viable alternative)
Whether to add a 7th process sub-skill
Parent routing precision (keyword vs intent classifier)
